name: plugin lifecycle: migration script preserves user state files (FAILURE-LOG.md, decisions.jsonl, lock.json, _operator/, attestations/) across upgrade
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/acme && echo "user data" > .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json && echo "user rule" > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/acme/rules.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate.sh" --from 0.3.0 --to 0.4.0 && grep "user data" .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json 1>&2 && grep "user rule" generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/acme/rules.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
